blockingIssues.description: AgentLens/Services/CursorConnector/CursorConnectorManager.swift:1142 gates total-token normalization on explicit primary buckets, so total-only exact payloads are not normalized before fallback handling.
AgentLens/Services/CursorConnector/CursorConnectorManager.swift:1164 fallback gate omits total/cache-creation checks, allowing character-based fallback to run even when explicit usage data exists.

AgentLens/Services/UsageAggregatorParsers.swift:805 treats any token_count map as authoritative cumulative totals and suppresses delta parsing, so placeholder/partial token_count events can zero out Codex usage.
AgentLens/Services/DataStore/ParserCheckpointStore.swift:305 still overwrites usageSource on conflict in the atomic ingestion path, violating source-identity preservation across ingestion paths.
AgentLens/Services/LogParser/HermesParser.swift:458 applies fallback estimates with max(summary, estimated) even when explicit buckets exist, violating exact-missing-only fallback behavior.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add explicit enforcement guidance that workers must mark skillFeedback.followedProcedure=false when required TDD red/green steps or required reads are skipped, and require evidence of those steps in handoff verification.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: m2-core-token-extraction-invariants, m2-provider-specific-exact-first-parsers, and m2-tokenizer-flagged-fallback-and-source-identity all report procedure drift while handoffs still reported followedProcedure=true.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify validator expectations between per-feature workers and scrutiny-validator (specifically when swift test/swiftlint are mandatory per feature versus deferred to milestone scrutiny) to avoid inconsistent verification evidence.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: m2-multi-source-baseline-and-precedence-reconciliation review observed required commands in skill text were absent from worker handoff, while scrutiny-validator later ran milestone-wide gates.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Require EndFeatureRun handoff commitId values to be full, resolvable SHAs (validated with git rev-parse) before submission.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: m2-multi-source-baseline-and-precedence-reconciliation review found handoff commitId not directly resolvable until manual short-hash expansion.

rejectedObservations.observation: Add a swiftlint app command directly to services.yaml lint key.
Duplicate canonical token_usage upsert rules across files.
